relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Times and seasons do not need to dominate the community.
The day of the Lord comes unexpectedly.
False security cannot prevent reckoning.
Children of light are not overtaken by darkness.
They belong to day, not night.
Stay awake and sober.
Night belongs to sleeping and dullness.
Day-people wear trust, love, and hope as armor.
The Divine appoints the community for salvation/healing.
Whether awake or asleep, they live together with Messiah.
Comfort and build one another.
Recognize those who labor and guide in the Lord.
Esteem them in love and live in peace.
Correct disorder, encourage the fainthearted, hold the weak, and be patient with all.
Do not answer harm with harm; pursue good toward all.
Rejoice always.
Pray without ceasing.
Give thanks in everything.
Do not quench Spirit.
Do not despise prophecy.
Test all things and hold the good.
Keep distance from harmful forms.
The Divine of peace sanctifies spirit, soul, and body wholly.
The calling One is trustworthy and will complete the work.
The apostles ask for prayer.
All siblings are greeted in holy affection.
The letter is to be read to all.
Grace closes the letter.

contemplative_note: 1 Thessalonians 5 is watchful peace: trust, love, and hope as armor; prayer without ceasing; Spirit unquenched; whole spirit, soul, and body kept in peace.
